---
title: "\'My Reading\' By the Editor"
---

## \'My Reading\' By the Editor

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1892
**Genre:** Non-fiction, literary criticism
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 2:5 (April 1892) 87-94

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
